description: Create a 6-slide clinical case presentation for a Cardiology Grand Rounds using ONLYOFFICE Presentation Editor. Use the clinical data located in ~/Documents/Presentations/Case_Materials/ (clinical_narrative.txt, cardiac_labs.csv, ecg_admission.jpg, and lv_angiogram.jpg). The presentation must include: a title slide named "Takotsubo Cardiomyopathy Case" (font size 32pt or larger) with presenter "Dr. Chen"; a summary of the chief complaint, symptom onset, and clinical outcome derived from the narrative; a lab results slide including the terms "Troponin I" and "NT-proBNP"; and slides for the ECG and angiogram images annotated with "ST elevation" and "apical ballooning" respectively. Save the final presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/grand_rounds_takotsubo.pptx.
